title: Bare Bones x LambdaBetterGrass
body:
# [Bare Bones] x [LambdaBetterGrass]

This is an addon for the [Bare Bones] resource pack to better integrate with [LambdaBetterGrass]!

![pack.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7x43ZN3Z/images/aa245ac3f1d7c5bd1ec92b197fb2c3c64e2323e2.png)

## Features

- Better integration all the better grass features with custom textures in the Bare Bones' style.
- Snowy/mossy/etc fences now available in the Bare Bones' style!

![snow_fences](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7x43ZN3Z/images/b0f5066a64481bb10f4ab48118a803d15b7462b9.png)

## Setup

![Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7x43ZN3Z/images/0626ccb9cb861440b34e9fc89bead68a07ec53ca.png)

For the resource pack to properly work, please have both the `LambdaBetterGrass - Default` and [Bare Bones] resource packs enabled with lower priority than this resource pack.

[LambdaBetterGrass] is also required for this to work.

[LambdaBetterGrass]: https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass "LambdaBetterGrass Modrinth page"
[Bare Bones]: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones "Bare Bones Modrinth page"
